commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the GitHub Real behavior proof policy parser and its focused tests so Real behavior proof section slicing ignores Markdown headings inside fenced terminal output.

PR surface: Tests +32, Other +24. Total +56 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: put a fenced transcript with `## ...` inside the `Evidence after fix` field and place the live evidence signal after that heading; current `extractFieldValue` can truncate that field before the signal.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can extend the existing parser helper to field extraction and add one regression without product or ownership judgment.

target.title: fix(ci): ignore fenced headings in proof parser
target.body:
## Summary

Hardens the Real behavior proof parser so Markdown-looking headings inside fenced terminal output do not end the proof section early.

This keeps the existing proof field requirements and mock-only checks intact; the section slicer now ignores headings while inside backtick or tilde fences. The helper opens fences with normal info strings, but only closes an active fence when the marker uses the same character, is at least as long as the opener, and has only optional trailing whitespace.

## Context

PR #87341 exposed the original bug: its real behavior proof copied a generated prompt that contained `## TOOLS.md` inside a fenced output block. The parser treated that line as the next PR-body heading and missed the later `Observed result after fix` / `What was not tested` fields.

The follow-up ClawSweeper review also caught the tighter Markdown edge case: inside an outer triple-backtick transcript, a same-length line like ```` ```js ```` is content, not a closing fence. This patch covers that case directly.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Real behavior proof sections keep parseable fields after copied terminal output that contains Markdown headings such as `## TOOLS.md`, including when an outer triple-backtick transcript contains a same-length info-string line like ```` ```js ```` before the heading.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, branch `codex/proof-parser-fence-aware-section`, commit `0a1b291d3b700719b28600fef9acdc8dd890db51`, Node `v26.0.0`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a direct local node smoke against `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-policy.mjs` with a synthetic external PR body whose triple-backtick fenced terminal output contains a same-length ```` ```js ```` line and `## TOOLS.md`, followed by `Observed result after fix` and `What was not tested`. Also ran the focused policy test file with the repo Vitest wrapper.

Evidence after fix: The direct node smoke returned `section contains same-length info fence: true`, `section contains fenced heading: true`, `status: passed`, and preserved both required fields after the fenced output. Focused regression tests also passed 1 file / 27 tests. Copied output is included below.

Observed result after fix: `extractRealBehaviorProofSections` preserves the same-length info-string fence line and `## TOOLS.md` heading as proof-section content, and `evaluateRealBehaviorProof` still returns `passed` while reading the required fields that appear after the fenced output.

What was not tested: Live GitHub Actions proof-gate rerun on commit `0a1b291d3b700719b28600fef9acdc8dd890db51`. `pnpm test test/scripts/real-behavior-proof-policy.test.ts` was attempted before the first push but pnpm stopped before tests with a dependency purge/install prompt, so the repo node wrapper was used instead.

Direct parser smoke output:

```text
section contains same-length info fence: true
section contains fenced heading: true
status: passed
observedResult: Parser preserved the fenced heading and still read fields below the terminal transcript.
notTested: Live GitHub Actions rerun before updating this PR.
```

## Verification

- `node --input-type=module` direct parser smoke against `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-policy.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/real-behavior-proof-policy.test.ts` (1 file / 27 tests passed)
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean: no accepted/actionable findings)

Refs #87341
target.author: monkeyleet
